Entries.Name: Clementine
Entries.Description: Clementine is a modern music player and library organizer, supporting various audio formats and online radio services.

Entries.Name: darktable
Entries.Description: Open-source photo editing tool, offering an intuitive interface, advanced editing capabilities, and a non-destructive workflow for seamless image enhancement.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Open-source photo editing tool, offering an intuitive interface, advanced editing capabilities, and a non-destructive workflow for seamless image enhancement.

Entries.Name: digiKam
Entries.Description: digiKam is an advanced open-source photo management software with features for organizing, editing, and sharing photos.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: digiKam is an advanced open-source photo management software with features for organizing, editing, and sharing photos.

Entries.Name: EarTrumpet (Audio)
Entries.Description: EarTrumpet is an audio control app for Windows, providing a simple and intuitive interface for managing sound settings.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: EarTrumpet is an audio control app for Windows, providing a simple and intuitive interface for managing sound settings.

Entries.Name: FFmpeg (full)
Entries.Description: FFmpeg is a powerful multimedia processing tool that enables users to convert, edit, and stream audio and video files with a vast range of codecs and formats. | Note: FFmpeg can not be uninstalled using WinGet.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: FFmpeg is a powerful multimedia processing tool that enables users to convert, edit, and stream audio and video files with a vast range of codecs and formats. | Note: FFmpeg can not be uninstalled using WinGet.

Entries.Name: Fire Alpaca
Entries.Description: Fire Alpaca is a free digital painting software that provides a wide range of drawing tools and a user-friendly interface.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Fire Alpaca is a free digital painting software that provides a wide range of drawing tools and a user-friendly interface.

Entries.Name: Lightshot (Screenshots)
Entries.Description: Lightshot is an easy-to-use, light-weight screenshot software tool, where you can optionally edit your screenshots using different tools, share them via Internet and/or save to disk, and customize the available options.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Lightshot is an easy-to-use, light-weight screenshot software tool, where you can optionally edit your screenshots using different tools, share them via Internet and/or save to disk, and customize the available options.

Entries.Name: FreeCAD
Entries.Description: FreeCAD is a parametric 3D CAD modeler, designed for product design and engineering tasks, with a focus on flexibility and extensibility.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: FreeCAD is a parametric 3D CAD modeler, designed for product design and engineering tasks, with a focus on flexibility and extensibility.

Entries.Name: Harmonoid
Entries.Description: Plays and manages your music library. Looks beautiful and juicy. Playlists, visuals, synced lyrics, pitch shift, volume boost and more.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Plays and manages your music library. Looks beautiful and juicy. Playlists, visuals, synced lyrics, pitch shift, volume boost and more.

Entries.Name: Jellyfin Media Player
Entries.Description: Jellyfin Media Player is a client application for the Jellyfin media server, providing access to your media library.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Jellyfin Media Player is a client application for the Jellyfin media server, providing access to your media library.

Entries.Name: Jellyfin Server
Entries.Description: Jellyfin Server is an open-source media server software, allowing you to organize and stream your media library.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Jellyfin Server is an open-source media server software, allowing you to organize and stream your media library.

Entries.Name: K-Lite Codec Standard
Entries.Description: K-Lite Codec Pack Standard is a collection of audio and video codecs and related tools, providing essential components for media playback.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: K-Lite Codec Pack Standard is a collection of audio and video codecs and related tools, providing essential components for media playback.

Entries.Name: Kodi Media Center
Entries.Description: Kodi is an open-source media center application that allows you to play and view most videos, music, podcasts, and other digital media files.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Kodi is an open-source media center application that allows you to play and view most videos, music, podcasts, and other digital media files.

Entries.Name: mpc-qt
Entries.Description: MPC-HC (Media Player Classic Home Cinema) is considered by many to be the quintessential media player for the Windows desktop. MPC-QT (Media Player Classic Qute Theater) aims to reproduce most of the interface and functionality of MPC-HC while using libmpv to play video instead of DirectShow.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: MPC-HC (Media Player Classic Home Cinema) is considered by many to be the quintessential media player for the Windows desktop. MPC-QT (Media Player Classic Qute Theater) aims to reproduce most of the interface and functionality of MPC-HC while using libmpv to play video instead of DirectShow.

Entries.Name: Modern Flyouts
Entries.Description: An open-source, modern, Fluent Design-based set of flyouts for Windows.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: An open-source, modern, Fluent Design-based set of flyouts for Windows.

Entries.Name: Media Player Classic - Home Cinema
Entries.Description: Media Player Classic - Home Cinema (MPC-HC) is a free and open-source video and audio player for Windows. MPC-HC is based on the original Guliverkli project and contains many additional features and bug fixes.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Media Player Classic - Home Cinema (MPC-HC) is a free and open-source video and audio player for Windows. MPC-HC is based on the original Guliverkli project and contains many additional features and bug fixes.

Entries.Name: Equalizer APO
Entries.Description: Equalizer APO is a parametric / graphic equalizer for Windows.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Equalizer APO is a parametric / graphic equalizer for Windows.

Entries.Name: MuseScore
Entries.Description: Create, play back and print beautiful sheet music with free and easy to use music notation software MuseScore.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Create, play back and print beautiful sheet music with free and easy to use music notation software MuseScore.

Entries.Name: MusicBee (Music Player)
Entries.Description: MusicBee is a customizable music player with support for various audio formats. It includes features like an integrated search function, tag editing, and more.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: MusicBee is a customizable music player with support for various audio formats. It includes features like an integrated search function, tag editing, and more.

Entries.Name: Mp3tag (Metadata Audio Editor)
Entries.Description: Mp3tag is a powerful and yet easy-to-use tool to edit metadata of common audio formats.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Mp3tag is a powerful and yet easy-to-use tool to edit metadata of common audio formats.

Entries.Name: TagScanner (Tag Scanner)
Entries.Description: TagScanner is a powerful tool for organizing and managing your music collection.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: TagScanner is a powerful tool for organizing and managing your music collection.

Entries.Name: nGlide (3dfx compatibility)
Entries.Description: nGlide is a 3Dfx Voodoo Glide wrapper. It allows you to play games that use Glide API on modern graphics cards without the need for a 3Dfx Voodoo graphics card.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: nGlide is a 3Dfx Voodoo Glide wrapper. It allows you to play games that use Glide API on modern graphics cards without the need for a 3Dfx Voodoo graphics card.

Entries.Name: Nomacs (Image viewer)
Entries.Description: Nomacs is a free, open-source image viewer that supports multiple platforms. It features basic image editing capabilities and supports a variety of image formats.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Nomacs is a free, open-source image viewer that supports multiple platforms. It features basic image editing capabilities and supports a variety of image formats.

Entries.Name: OpenSCAD
Entries.Description: OpenSCAD is a free and open-source script-based 3D CAD modeler. It is especially useful for creating parametric designs for 3D printing.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: OpenSCAD is a free and open-source script-based 3D CAD modeler. It is especially useful for creating parametric designs for 3D printing.

Entries.Name: Policy Plus
Entries.Description: Local Group Policy Editor plus more, for all Windows editions.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Local Group Policy Editor plus more, for all Windows editions.

Entries.Name: qView
Entries.Description: qView is an image viewer designed with minimalism and usability in mind.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: qView is an image viewer designed with minimalism and usability in mind.

Entries.Name: Plex Media Server
Entries.Description: Plex Media Server is a media server software that allows you to organize and stream your media library. It supports various media formats and offers a wide range of features.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Plex Media Server is a media server software that allows you to organize and stream your media library. It supports various media formats and offers a wide range of features.

Entries.Name: Plex Desktop
Entries.Description: Plex Desktop for Windows is the front end for Plex Media Server.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Plex Desktop for Windows is the front end for Plex Media Server.

Entries.Name: Strawberry (Music Player)
Entries.Description: Strawberry is an open-source music player that focuses on music collection management and audio quality. It supports various audio formats and features a clean user interface.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Strawberry is an open-source music player that focuses on music collection management and audio quality. It supports various audio formats and features a clean user interface.

Entries.Name: Stremio
Entries.Description: Stremio is a media center application that allows users to organize and stream their favorite movies, TV shows, and video content.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Stremio is a media center application that allows users to organize and stream their favorite movies, TV shows, and video content.

Entries.Name: Tidal
Entries.Description: Tidal is a music streaming service known for its high-fidelity audio quality and exclusive content. It offers a vast library of songs and curated playlists.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Tidal is a music streaming service known for its high-fidelity audio quality and exclusive content. It offers a vast library of songs and curated playlists.

Entries.Name: Videomass
Entries.Description: Videomass by GianlucaPernigotto is a cross-platform GUI for FFmpeg, streamlining multimedia file processing with batch conversions and user-friendly features.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Videomass by GianlucaPernigotto is a cross-platform GUI for FFmpeg, streamlining multimedia file processing with batch conversions and user-friendly features.

Entries.Name: Voicemeeter (Audio)
Entries.Description: Voicemeeter is a virtual audio mixer that allows you to manage and enhance audio streams on your computer. It is commonly used for audio recording and streaming purposes.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Voicemeeter is a virtual audio mixer that allows you to manage and enhance audio streams on your computer. It is commonly used for audio recording and streaming purposes.

Entries.Name: Voicemeeter Potato
Entries.Description: Voicemeeter Potato is the ultimate version of the Voicemeeter Audio Mixer Application endowed with Virtual Audio Device to mix and manage any audio sources from or to any audio devices or applications.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Voicemeeter Potato is the ultimate version of the Voicemeeter Audio Mixer Application endowed with Virtual Audio Device to mix and manage any audio sources from or to any audio devices or applications.

Entries.Name: Yt-dlp
Entries.Description: Command-line tool that allows you to download videos from YouTube and other supported sites. It is an improved version of the popular youtube-dl.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Command-line tool that allows you to download videos from YouTube and other supported sites. It is an improved version of the popular youtube-dl.

Entries.Name: QGIS
Entries.Description: QGIS (Quantum GIS) is an open-source Geographic Information System (GIS) software that enables users to create, edit, visualize, analyze, and publish geospatial information on Windows, macOS, and Linux platforms.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: QGIS (Quantum GIS) is an open-source Geographic Information System (GIS) software that enables users to create, edit, visualize, analyze, and publish geospatial information on Windows, macOS, and Linux platforms.

Entries.Name: NDI Tools
Entries.Description: NDI, or Network Device Interface, is a video connectivity standard that enables multimedia systems to identify and communicate with one another over IP and to encode, transmit, and receive high-quality, low latency, frame-accurate video and audio, and exchange metadata in real-time.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: NDI, or Network Device Interface, is a video connectivity standard that enables multimedia systems to identify and communicate with one another over IP and to encode, transmit, and receive high-quality, low latency, frame-accurate video and audio, and exchange metadata in real-time.

Entries.Name: Kicad
Entries.Description: Kicad is an open-source EDA tool. It's a good starting point for those who want to do electrical design and is even used by professionals in the industry.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Kicad is an open-source EDA tool. It's a good starting point for those who want to do electrical design and is even used by professionals in the industry.

Entries.Name: Subtitle Edit
Entries.Description: Subtitle Edit is a free and open-source editor for video subtitles.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Subtitle Edit is a free and open-source editor for video subtitles.
